title: Egghead Falls Under Siege
description: On pages 10–12, this part focuses on Luffy, Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Lucci, Kid as CP0 attacks Egghead, Seraphim enter the conflict, Stussy betrays CP0, Kuma moves toward the Red Line, and Vegapunk’s escape plan collapses.
scene: CP0 attacks Egghead, Seraphim enter the conflict, Stussy betrays CP0, Kuma moves toward the Red Line, and Vegapunk’s escape plan collapses.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: hurry up and get on it.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're so much Kinder than the Hancock I know!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You insolent being! I'm just Follo- wing orders, that's all!

dialogue.speaker: Kid
dialogue.text: I entrust old man punk to you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: We'll definitely get him off this island!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So you're awake. We're in the vacuum rocket.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Ehhh!? Who the hell are you!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A lot has happened. Luffy will explain things later.

summary: This part advances the Egghead Under Siege through 32 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
